description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat, multi-tiered roof and a striking geometric design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light gray materials, with expansive glass windows and sliding doors that open onto balconies and patios. The front facade is landscaped with manicured lawns, shrubs, and a pathway leading to the main entrance, while the rear includes a private pool area and additional greenery. The structure includes covered parking spaces, a prominent balcony above the entrance, and several outdoor living spaces. The building's design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality and luxury.
description: A large, modern bungalow with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, and landscaped surroundings. The design features clean lines, outdoor living spaces, and a mix of dark and light gray materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, manicured lawn, shrubs, and a prominent balcony above the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof structure, covered parking, and a glimpse of the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors, balconies, a private pool, and a walled backyard with greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with additional landscaping, side windows, and a secondary balcony visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
